channel.title: Cortadito on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Cortadito on Barista At Home

item.title: Cortadito Recipe: The Authentic Cuban Espresso Drink (Cortado vs Cortadito Explained)
item.description: How to make a real Cuban cortadito at home — sweetened café cubano cut with steamed milk, topped with espumita foam. Includes cortado vs cortadito differences, ratios, espuma technique, and 6 variations.
